errors.required_review_fields: userId, gameId, rating and comment are required
errors.invalid_rating: rating must be an integer between 1 and 5
errors.review_already_exists: user already posted a review for this game
errors.required_buysell_fields: userId, gameId, title and type are required

errors.invalid_quantity: quantity must be a positive integer
